extraction.one_line_summary: MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe won from the breakaway while POGAČAR and ROGLIČ distanced BERNAL by 37 seconds on the final climb, vaulting POGAČAR to second overall.
tactical_patterns: POWLESS Neilson infiltrated break as teammate of MARTÍNEZ, enabling pacing support on final climb for stage win setup.
VAN GARDEREN Tejay in pink jersey attacked early to join break, using GC position to secure breakaway selection.
SAGAN Peter targeted intermediate sprint after three categorized climbs, positioning before sprinters could contest it effectively.
ROGLIČ Primož and POGAČAR Tadej cooperated on final climb to distance BERNAL, prioritizing time gaps over racing each other.
BERNAL Egan cracked after team set tempo, losing 37 seconds despite Ineos controlling earlier when teammates exhausted supporting role.

rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: positive: won slowest sprint at finish after tracking KÄMNA the entire climb, showing poise under counter-attacks
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: first mountain stage defense in yellow showed no weaknesses, accelerated on final climb to take time
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: jumped to second overall by gaining 37s on BERNAL despite losing minute to mechanical days earlier
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: lost 37 seconds on final climb after Ineos teammates exhausted themselves, now 59s down from yellow
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: positive: finished second after being in early break, strong enough to follow MARTÍNEZ until sprint
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: positive: tactical break infiltration as domestique proved crucial for MARTÍNEZ's winning move setup
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: positive: climbed into fourth overall at 1:10, gained positions as others cracked on final climb
